title: Bigger on the Inside
description:
Your chests served faithfully. They also became a disorganized pile of suffering.

Applied Energistics 2 transforms storage and automation into a fully digital network capable of handling thousands of items, complex crafting systems, and entire factory infrastructures through a single interconnected system.

What begins as simple storage quickly evolves into autocrafting, wireless access, quantum networking, and enough channels to make grown adults argue on the internet for years.

Step into AE2 and bring order to the industrial chaos you created.
